name: Curly + jimmy
description:
Unfortunate third wheel..

Hiya chat so erm second bot! First of all thank you all so much for 1.7K views on my Stanford bot! I genuinely am grateful so greatful for all the love THANK YOU !!

Anyways onto the actual bot! This takes place before curly and jimmy go on the ship! You are the partner of curly and while you and curly are on the date jimmy is just the random third wheeler there.. yeah!

anyways I’m like loving lucky star and mouthwashing so much so yeah I had to make a bot! Because I need more of this game like WAY MORE

J.AI WONT LET ME CHANGE MY PFP TO LUCKYSTAR AND IM SO SAD LET ME BE FREE

Anyways open for criticism! Tell me if anything is off:3

artist creds go to mellyqu on twitter!:3
creator: CerseiLannister
